Log:
  databases/mariadb55-server: Fix FreeBSD 8 and 9 (jemallac issue)

  Bring in MariaDB 10's jemalloc logic to fix FreeBSD 8 and 9.
  While here, convert to USES+= execinfo

  Final fix by:	marino
